name: Chocolate Pavlova
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper or foil. Trace an 8-inch circle on the paper and turn it over.
2. In a bowl, beat egg whites with salt and cream of tartar until soft peaks form using electric beaters.
3. Gradually beat in sugar until stiff, glossy peaks form.
4. Sift cocoa powder and cornstarch over the meringue mixture; gently fold them in.
5. Gently fold in vinegar, vanilla extract, and finely chopped bittersweet chocolate.
6. Mound the batter onto the prepared baking sheet.
7. Bake at 275°F (135°C) for 1-1/2 hours or until the crust is crisp but the center remains soft.
8. Transfer to a rack and let cool completely.
9. Place on a serving plate.
10. Topping: Slice or halve strawberries. Set aside.
11. In a bowl, whip cream with sugar until light and fluffy.
12. Pour whipped cream onto the meringue.
13. Arrange strawberries decoratively over the top.
14. Drizzle melted bittersweet chocolate over the berries.
Tips:
1. Egg whites beat better when they are cold but whip up more smoothly at room temperature.
2. If you don't have any bittersweet chocolate on hand to drizzle over the berries, sift some unsweetened cocoa powder over the top for a dazzling effect.
